home.title: Welcome to GameController
home.subtitle: Your unified gaming hub. Connect your accounts to view your library and wishlist.
home.profileDesc: View your Steam Profile, Level and Status.
home.libraryDesc: Browse your owned games and launch them effortlessly.
home.wishlistDesc: Track your Steam wishlist and get notified on discounts.

settings.title: Settings & Accounts
settings.steamDesc: Enter your Steam credentials to fetch your library and wishlist.
